title: CS Navigator - About This Application
content:
CS NAVIGATOR - ABOUT THIS APPLICATION

CS Navigator is an AI-powered academic advising chatbot for Computer Science students at Morgan State University.

Developed by: Morgan State University Computer Science Student Lab
Department: Computer Science, School of Computer, Mathematical and Natural Sciences
Faculty Advisor: Dr. Shuangbao "Paul" Wang, Department Chair

Website: https://cs.inavigator.ai
API: https://api.inavigator.ai

CS Navigator helps students with:
- Course recommendations and degree planning
- Prerequisite checking and course eligibility
- Registration procedures and forms
- Faculty and staff contact information
- Financial aid, scholarships, and tuition
- Campus resources and student organizations
- DegreeWorks degree audit integration
- Canvas LMS grade and assignment tracking

CS Navigator is an open-source project. Contributions from students and developers are welcome.

For questions or feedback about CS Navigator, contact the CS department at (443) 885-3962 or compsci@morgan.edu.
